rationale: The Russia-Ukraine war remains the dominant reality for Ukrainian residents; Trump's comments jeopardizing the Iran deal are relevant as they may signal reduced US diplomatic bandwidth for Ukraine.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — ongoing active combat
top_events.summary: War continues at high intensity with no qualitative change this cycle. Daily life remains severely disrupted by combat, air strikes, and infrastructure damage.

top_events.title: Trump says Israeli attacks on Beirut unjustified, puts Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Trump's focus on Middle East diplomacy and friction over Iran deal may reduce US attention and resources available for Ukraine support — rhetoric only but strategically relevant.

top_events.title: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' loved ones killed in Ukraine
top_events.summary: A human-interest story about Russian families using AI to recreate deceased soldiers — no direct military or policy impact on Ukraine's situation.
